status: Stage S3 (L2/L3/L4 Build) IN PROGRESS 2/5 — S3.T2 eaasp-l2-memory-engine COMPLETE. New Python FastAPI service at tools/eaasp-l2-memory-engine/ with 3-layer SQLite store: Layer 1 anchors (append-only, DB-enforced via no_update/no_delete triggers), Layer 2 memory_files (versioned, state machine agent_suggested→confirmed→archived), Layer 3 memory_fts (FTS5 keyword + exp-decay time weighting, HALF_LIFE_DAYS=30). 6 MCP tools via REST facade pattern (same as S3.T1 D10): memory_search/read/write_anchor/write_file/list/archive. REST endpoints: GET /tools, POST /tools/{name}/invoke, POST /api/v1/memory/search, GET /api/v1/memory/anchors. Tests 47/47 (8 anchors + 7 files + 5 index + 8 mcp + 6 api + 17 review regression): `cd tools/eaasp-l2-memory-engine && uv run pytest`. RuFlo swarm-1775923722601 trace: designer (plan §432-479 + MVP_SCOPE §3.3 verified) → coder (W1-W5 single-pass, 30/30 first run after async fixture fix) → reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS (3 Critical C1/C2/C3 + 5 Major + 8 Minor). Applied inline: C1 BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction wrapping write(), C2 FTS5 operator stripping via regex allowlist + try/except defense, C3 top_k/limit clamping (MAX_TOP_K=100, MAX_LIST_LIMIT=200), M2 latest-version JOIN eliminates N+1, M3 DB triggers anchors_no_update/anchors_no_delete, M4 status transition enforcement inside write() when memory_id provided, N4 HTTP status map (404/409/422/400), N6 oversample math simplified, WAL journal_mode. 5 new Deferred: D12 connection-per-call (latency), D13 archive FTS semantics, D14 _row_to_memory private cross-module, D15 ruff/mypy config, plus D16 left for S3.T3. Deferred D2 (grid-runtime/src/harness.rs payload.memory_refs) now UNBLOCKED (memory_search endpoint live) but remains ⏳ until harness is wired. Plan progress 9/15. Next: S3.T3 eaasp-l3-governance (thin L3 — policy engine + managed-settings + audit, Contract 1/4/5 partial).
